channel.title: Repos on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Repos on Arrans github.io

item.title: arrans_overlay
item.description: Arrans Gentoo Overlay

item.title: slackdump
item.description: Save or export your private and public Slack messages, threads, files, and users locally without admin privileges.

item.title: kalarm
item.description: Application to manage alarms and other timer-based alerts on the desktop

item.title: golang-ical
item.description: A ICS / ICal parser and serialiser for Golang.

item.title: discord-rss-cron
item.description: Very basic cron job discord bot for publishing the latest entry in an rss feed.

item.title: arran4.github.io
item.description: A nausiatingly personal github page.

item.title: awesome-flutter-desktop
item.description: A curated list of awesome things related to Flutter desktop.

item.title: awesome-flutter-linux
item.description: A curated list of awesome Linux-specific Flutter packages and projects.

item.title: dotfiles
item.description: Just a collection of dotfiles managed by Chezmoi

item.title: send-to-google-photos
item.description: A desktop utility to help easily upload files to google photos from what ever shell

item.title: arran4
item.description: Github Profile landing page github repo

item.title: pukcab
item.description: Lightweight network backup system

item.title: darlinghq
item.description: Dockerfile for darlinghq build

item.title: go-rfc5849-hmac
item.description: Implementation of rfc5849 hmac wrapper

item.title: go-simpro
item.description: Very simple simpro go interface. Entirely generated.

item.title: move-dups-script
item.description: Simple program to move dups nothing really interesting - Once off go project which could have been a shell script

item.title: gaelogger
item.description: Another google apps engine go logger this one is for the new go111+ world..

item.title: datastoreutils
item.description: Basic google cloud datastore helpers

item.title: go-qt-windows-64-shared-action
item.description: Abandedon github action for abandoned qt for go project

item.title: sentencestats
item.description: Tools to plot character usage in sentences

item.title: .github
item.description: Dot-github

item.title: trace-redirects
item.description: Very simple cli tool for tracing redirects on a site - nothing you couldn’t do with curl

item.title: spacemap
item.description: 2d space mapper, using a couple different algorithms with an interchangable interface

item.title: trakt-import-github-action
item.description: A github script for importing netflix and other exported files into trakt

item.title: phonenumber
item.description: A generator for the nokia phone keyboard meme

item.title: mostcomm
item.description: A cli utility for finding the most common and sorting by length, lines-sets in a text file

item.title: opossum
item.description: Rudimentary web browser written in Golang

item.title: monday
item.description: Monday is a minimalistic l10n, i18n package for translation of month and day of week names in time.Date objects.

item.title: mnemonicode
item.description: Fork of http://web.archive.org/web/20101031205747/http://www.tothink.com/mnemonic/

item.title: go-gui-projects
item.description: A list of Go GUI projects

item.title: Mango
item.description: Mango is a self-hosted manga server and web reader

item.title: matchStickProblem
item.description: Generates an image of solving the “match stick problem” (move a match stick) for amusement

item.title: SynologyPhotosAPI
item.description: Unofficial documentation of Synology Photos API

item.title: dateparse
item.description: GoLang Parse many date strings without knowing format in advance.

item.title: tsobjectutils
item.description: Some typescript objects I use in a couple repos

item.title: gorillamuxlogic
item.description: Some very simple gorilla mux logic for mux.MatcherFunc

item.title: go-template-functional-operations
item.description: These functions enable a more functional programming style within template rendering, allowing you to easily perform operations like mapping, filtering, and finding indices directly within your templates.

item.title: chezmoi
item.description: Manage your dotfiles across multiple diverse machines, securely.

item.title: aubelsb2
item.description: aubelsb2 stats

item.description: A deb generator for a minor configuration I make on a lot of systems

item.description: A package generator for AWS SAM

item.description: Compilation of Low Fodmap resources

item.title: window_manager
item.description: This plugin allows Flutter desktop apps to resizing and repositioning the window.

item.description: A quick and simple installer for my kde keyboard bindings in system, as a deb/rpm file

item.title: awesome-google-cloud

item.title: system_windows
item.description: Get opened windows and check which one of them is currently focused

item.title: isar
item.description: Extremely fast, easy to use, and fully async NoSQL database for Flutter

item.description: Landing page for when you open browers / live bookmarks in go. – AI based C -> Go port - Manually adjusted to use github as the backend and simplified
